result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.as_of
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
-- transfers counted for the agent the case was transferred FROM (old owner)
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(old_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
-- agents who handled >0 cases in period: either initial owner on created cases, or received a transfer
initial_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.as_of
  WHERE NULLIF(c.ownerid,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
received_transfers AS (
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(new_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY new_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM initial_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM received_transfers
  ) s
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(cnt) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.as_of
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
-- transfers counted for the agent the case was transferred FROM (old owner)
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(old_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
-- agents who handled >0 cases in period: either initial owner on created cases, or received a transfer
initial_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.as_of
  WHERE NULLIF(c.ownerid,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
received_transfers AS (
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(new_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY new_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM initial_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM received_transfers
  ) s
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(cnt) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.as_of
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
-- transfers counted for the agent the case was transferred FROM (old owner)
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(old_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
-- agents who handled >0 cases in period: either initial owner on created cases, or received a transfer
initial_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.as_of
  WHERE NULLIF(c.ownerid,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
received_transfers AS (
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(new_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY new_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM initial_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM received_transfers
  ) s
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(cnt) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS as_of,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.as_of
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(old_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
initial_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.as_of
  WHERE NULLIF(c.ownerid,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
received_transfers AS (
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM assignments
  WHERE NULLIF(new_owner,'') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY new_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM initial_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM received_transfers
  ) s
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(cnt) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;
